claim_text: Audit firms may have strong workflow pain.
evidence_needed_for_B: 2+ independent audit-firm interviews citing acute, specific workflow pain.
evidence_needed_for_A: A pilot in which the CRM measurably reduces that workflow pain.

claim_text: Audit firms may have budget for CRM/workflow tools.
evidence_needed_for_B: 2+ audit-firm interviews confirming a real budget line and buyer.
evidence_needed_for_A: A closed pilot/paid engagement at the expected price point.

claim_text: Professional services firms may need better pipeline visibility.
evidence_needed_for_B: 2+ professional-services interviews naming pipeline visibility as a priority.
evidence_needed_for_A: A pilot showing improved pipeline visibility drives a business outcome.

claim_text: CRM positioning may be clear but too generic.
evidence_needed_for_B: Message-test showing 'CRM' is understood but rated undifferentiated.
evidence_needed_for_A: Win/loss data showing 'CRM' framing loses on differentiation.

claim_text: Revenue Operations Platform positioning may better express business value.
evidence_needed_for_B: Message-test where 'RevOps' out-scores CRM on value and engagement.
evidence_needed_for_A: Conversion data showing the RevOps framing wins deals.

claim_text: AI Readiness Platform positioning may be differentiated but could overpromise.
evidence_needed_for_B: Message-test measuring differentiation vs credibility risk of the AI framing.
evidence_needed_for_A: Post-sale data showing the AI framing did not create unmet expectations.

claim_text: Target customers may lack structured customer data.
evidence_needed_for_B: Data-maturity assessment across several target customers.
evidence_needed_for_A: Longitudinal data linking data structure to realised AI value.

claim_text: CRM implementation may improve AI readiness.
evidence_needed_for_B: A before/after readiness measure across early CRM adopters.
evidence_needed_for_A: A pilot showing CRM adoption raised AI-derived value.

claim_text: GTM commitment should wait until core claims reach at least grade B.
evidence_needed_for_B: Agreement on the gate plus a tracked view of the three gate-claims' grades.
evidence_needed_for_A: Evidence that the gated approach outperformed committing earlier.
